ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "pickup_year" INTEGER /* Year of the trip pickup */,
  "pickup_month" INTEGER /* Month of the trip pickup */,
  "pickup_day" INTEGER /* Day of the trip pickup */,
  "pickup_dayofweek" INTEGER /* Day of the week for the trip pickup */,
  "pickup_time" INTEGER /* Time of the trip pickup in minutes since midnight */,
  "pickup_location_code" INTEGER /* Code for the pickup location */,
  "dropoff_location_code" INTEGER /* Code for the drop-off location */,
  "trip_distance" REAL /* Distance of the trip in miles */,
  "trip_length" INTEGER /* Length of the trip in seconds */,
  "fare_amount" REAL /* Fare amount for the trip */,
  "fees_amount" REAL /* Additional fees for the trip */,
  "tolls_amount" REAL /* Tolls incurred during the trip */,
  "tip_amount" REAL /* Tip amount for the trip */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount paid for the trip */,
  "payment_type_id" INTEGER /* Payment type used for the trip */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver who took the trip */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle used for the trip */,
  "trip_status" TEXT /* Status of the trip (e.g., completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_payment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_type_id") REFERENCES payment_types ("payment_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_dropoff_location_code FOREIGN KEY ("dropoff_location_code") REFERENCES locations ("location_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_pickup_location_code FOREIGN KEY ("pickup_location_code") REFERENCES locations ("location_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., airport, landmark) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_types" (
  "payment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment type */,
  "payment_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment type (e.g., Cash, Credit Card) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the driver */,
  "driver_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Passenger capacity of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., taxi, bus) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fares" (
  "fare_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fare record */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trip associated with the fare */,
  "fare_amount" REAL /* Fare amount for the trip */,
  "fees_amount" REAL /* Additional fees for the trip */,
  "tolls_amount" REAL /* Tolls incurred during the trip */,
  "tip_amount" REAL /* Tip amount for the trip */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount paid for the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fare_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fares_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trip associated with the log */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle used for the trip */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "log_event" TEXT /* Event type (e.g., trip started, trip ended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_logs_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_logs_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trip associated with the rating */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver associated with the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the passenger (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text provided by the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gps_data" (
  "gps_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPS data point */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trip associated with the GPS data */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the GPS data point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the GPS data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the GPS data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gps_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gps_data_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)
